item.title: Thank for all of the support this year!🌵Went from 10k to 82k fol...
item.description:
View on Instagram


Thank for all of the support this year!🌵Went from 10k to 82k followers🤯 So just to show a little gratitude you can find the lesson and TAB for this solo free on my Patreon (link in bio)! Just search for ”Country solo in A7 #2” Thank you and I wish you a happy new guitar year!🤠 And for my new years resolution - I’ll try to look a bit more happy when I play😐•••#guitar #guitarist #telecaster #guitarsolo #guitarlicks#doublestops #country #countryguitar #chickenpicking
